engineersdecor.config.title: 工程师的装饰配置
engineersdecor.config.without_mob_chair_: 椅子不能给其他生物坐
engineersdecor.tooltip.massive_speed_boo: 提供 RF 能量可提升工作速度。
engineersdecor.tooltip.slabpickup.help: §r手持同类台阶往上/下看时单击该台阶可无需破坏快速拾起。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.clinker_b:
一种放在不同位置贴图有不同变化的砖块。
 比原版砖看起来颜色更深，颜色浓度也更高。

用于突出过烧砖墙的墙角装饰。
 朝向水平方向放置可产生装饰建筑物角落的样式。
 完全垂直朝上/下放置可产生装饰窗户的样式。
会优先复制相邻砂岩装饰方块的样式来方便更高建筑的建造。

过烧砖块制造的台阶。
 比原版砖看起来颜色更深，颜色浓度也更高。

一种放在不同位置贴图有不同变化的砖块。
 比原版砖看起来颜色更深，颜色浓度也更高。
 有更多可见的污垢或污迹。
污渍过烧砖块制造的台阶。

比原版砖看起来颜色更深，颜色浓度也更高。
 有更多可见的污垢或污迹。
比原版砖看起来颜色更深，颜色浓度也更高。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.dark_shin: 黑色陶瓷瓦片屋顶方块

符合黑色瓦片屋顶烟囱主干的烟囱口。
 右击可改变烟雾密度。
黑色瓦片屋顶烟囱主干

用来放置烟囱口的烟囱主干。
 可以放置沉浸工程继电器来穿过屋顶向内传输能量。
黑色陶瓷瓦片屋顶台阶
黑色陶瓷瓦片屋顶台阶薄片
黑色陶瓷瓦片屋顶线管
block.engineers_decor_reforged.dense_gri:
一种压制而成的泥土，与砂土非常类似，其光滑的表面上带有些许裂缝。
 常见于人来人往的小径或者肆意践踏的庭院中。重点是可以混入泥土和砂土。
 纹理会根据位置的不同而发生变化。
 可以阻止草的蔓延。

一种压制而成的沙土，其中混有石砾，常见于机械场和堆货场。
 其上不能种植花朵。
 纹理会根据位置的不同而发生变化。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.factory_d:
适用于高级工厂自动化的投掷器。
 有十二个轮询选择的储物格。
 投掷的力度、角度、堆叠数量和冷却延时可在 GUI 调节。
 三个内部过滤器格带有逻辑与/逻辑或功能，可用作内部触发源。
 内部触发还能和外部红石信号触发再进行逻辑与/逻辑或。
 触发模拟按钮仅作测试用途。
 当内部触发条件满足，等待外部信号时，会预先打开卷帘门。
 所有符合条件的物品会同时投掷。
 鼠标悬停于按钮 2 秒可查看提示文本。

投掷角度 x/y（-45° 至 +45°）§r
§7可参考正面的红色和绿色座标轴。
投掷堆叠大小（1 至 32 个物品）

外部信号合并逻辑§r
§9逻辑与§7：只有在收到外部信号时进行投掷。
§9逻辑或§7：自动投掷匹配过滤器的物品，不匹配的则需要外部信号。
§9忽略§7：完全无视外部信号（持续投掷）。

过滤器合并逻辑§r
§9逻辑与§7：只在所有过滤器指示绿色时投掷所有匹配的堆叠。
§9逻辑或§7：单个过滤器指示绿色时即可投掷匹配的堆叠。
投掷延迟（1 秒至 10 秒）

外部红石信号指示灯
§7（点击可进行测试）。

触发模式（脉冲/持续）§r
§9脉冲§7：每次外部信号切换到开时进行一次投掷。
§9持续§7：只要外部信号为开则进行投掷。

投掷速度（由慢到快）
§7弹簧压力，底部低，顶部高。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.factory_h:
适用于高级工厂自动化的漏斗。可一次传输半组物品，最大收集范围 9x9。
 GUI 滑动条：控制收集距离（0 到 4），插入延迟（0.5 秒到 10 秒），插入一叠物品的大小（1 到 32）。
 GUI 红石控制：不反相/反相（默认），脉冲模式/持续模式（默认）。
插入堆叠大小§7（1 至 32 个物品）

延迟指示灯
§7延迟倒计时未结束，或漏斗无法对相邻容器进行插入时闪烁。
反相模式§7（反相/不反相/忽略）
插入延迟§7（1 秒至 10 秒）
掉落物收集半径§7（0 至 4）
block.engineers_decor_reforged.factory_p:
能够放置方块和种植作物或树。
 GUI 红石控制：不反相/反相（默认），脉冲模式/持续模式（默认）。
 也支持从耕地下方穿透方块种植。会吐出不能放置或种植的物品。
反相模式§7(反相/不反相/忽略)
block.engineers_decor_reforged.fluid_bar:
用于存储流体简单桶。
 自带一个类似气压管的小型储量计。
 默认竖直放置，潜行放置则可以选择特定方向。
 需要从竖直时的底面传输流体。
 支持将流体作为物品输入/输出，也支持比较器。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.halfslab_:
可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。

可垂直堆叠的薄片。
 手持薄片右/左击薄片堆叠的顶端或底部来添加/移除薄片。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.iron_bulb: 小型萤石光源，可放置于天花板、墙壁、栅栏以及金属栏杆上。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.iron_ceil: 小型萤石光源，可放置于顶部方块的边缘。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.iron_floo:
小型荧石光源，可放置于地板方块边缘。
 用于照亮电力光源难以安装的地方。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.iron_hatc:
一个上下颠倒的活板门，可放置在维修竖井或者梯子上方。
 防爆，打开时可以当作梯子。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.iron_inse:
小型荧石光源，可嵌入地板、天花板或墙里。
 用于照亮电力光源难以安装的地方。亮度与火把一样。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.metal_run:
典型的工业墙梯，由水平的金属杆蹬组成。
 往上/下看会爬得更快。

贴在墙上的交错金属杆蹬，能够爬上或爬下。
 往上/下看会爬得更快。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.panzergla:
强化的玻璃方块。
 昂贵，防爆。
 深灰色调，有隐约可见的结构线和多种纹理，外观无光泽。

强化的玻璃台阶。
 昂贵，防爆。
 深灰色调，有隐约可见的结构线和多种纹理。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rebar_con:
钢强化的混凝土。
 昂贵，防苦力怕/凋灵爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土台阶。
 昂贵，防苦力怕/凋灵爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土楼梯。
 昂贵，防苦力怕/凋灵爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土砖。
 昂贵，防苦力怕爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土砖台阶。
 昂贵，防苦力怕爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土砖楼梯。
 昂贵，防苦力怕爆炸。

钢强化的混凝土墙。
 昂贵，防苦力怕爆炸。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.sign_deco:
这不应该可合成或在 JEI 可见。
 仅用于创作目的。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.sign_hotw:
电气危害警告。
 不要忘记在高压线周围放置，否则下次审计时你会发现不合格。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.sign_radi: 标志牌“小心放射性危害”
block.engineers_decor_reforged.slag_bric: 一种放在不同位置贴图有不同变化的灰棕色砖块。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_blo: Breaks blocks in front of its working face. Can be disabled by applying a redstone signal. Processing speed depends on the target block.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_ele:
小型金属封装穿过式熔炉。
 可以从输入端提取物品，将物品放置在输出端物品栏。
 可以使用漏斗从任意面插入或提取物品。
 无法熔炼或烹饪的物品会直接送到出口。
 比加热的圆石熔炉更节能，速度更快。
 先进先出和自动输出一次移动一组物品。
 自动输出需要一点能量。
 在辅助格放置一个漏斗会自动提取输入端物品栏的物品。

辅助格
§7放置一个漏斗来启用自动输入。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_flu:
收集上方的流体。
 有一个三桶大的内部储罐。
 会追溯流体到附近的源方块。
 流体可被流体运输系统或桶移出。
 只会装满下方的储罐（重力传输）。
 与原版无限水兼容。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_fre:
制造冰的设备。
 将水冷冻成冰、浮冰，最终变成蓝冰。
 使用时需要用水桶右击或管道输入水，并且确保设备有充足 RF 供应。
 使用漏斗或其他物品提取设备来抽出冰。
 移除 RF 供应或通入红石信号可关闭机器。
 对于自动化，你可以使用红石比较器来检测水冷冻到了哪种冰。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_lab:
小型金属壳实验室窑。
 消耗固体燃料，向上排气。
 比圆石炉稍微热一点，隔热性也更好，因此效率更高。
 有两个用于储存的辅助格。
 两个堆叠的内部漏斗对输入、输出和燃料进行队列管理。
 在辅助格放置一个外置加热器并通入电力可以加快熔炼速度。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_mil:
偶尔给奶牛梳理和挤奶。
 内置流体储罐。
 不会喂食动物。
 使用桶获得牛奶。
 从后方或下方的方块物品栏拉取或存储牛奶容器物品。
 （偏好从下方输入，从后方输出，但也能将装满的牛奶容器放回原来的物品栏）
 支持将牛奶作为流体输出到下方的储罐和管道（仅当牛奶作为流体存在时）。
 小心牛栏里不要太拥挤，只有快乐的动物才会自觉地在挤奶机前散步。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_min:
高温、高绝缘电力熔石炉。§r
把矿物块加热成岩浆块，最后变成熔岩。
 用矿物块（石头、圆石等）点击，或用物品插入，将矿物块放入熔化器。
 用桶或其他提取流体的方法来提取熔岩。
 熔岩冷却时会生成黑曜石。
 移除 RF 能源或通入红石信号可禁用熔炼炉。
 对于自动化，可以用红石比较器来查看矿物处于哪个熔化阶段。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_sol:
暴露在阳光下时产生少量能量。
 用于低消耗地在远程系统给低压电容器充电。
 内部电荷泵电路积累并频繁输出 RF。
 产电量取决于时间和天气。
 单击可查看充电状态、产电量和进度。
电量：%1$s%%，总 %2$s RF§r｜产生 %3$s RF/t｜输出 %4$s RF/t
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_tre: Cuts grown trees in front of its working face. It does not collect the drops. Disable it with a redstone signal.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.small_was:
带有内部先进先出队列格的垃圾桶。
 物品可以从任意面插入，并且会保留到没有空间为止。
 一旦超过队列上限，最先进入的物品会被焚毁。
 通入 RF/FE 能源会增加处理速度。
 破坏时保留内部未销毁的物品。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_cat:
简单的栈桥，用于更好地操作大型机器。
 从上方放置在已有栈桥上还能往旁边拓展。
 使用钢栏杆右击可在侧面添加护栏。
（靠近后右击：精确放置，在远处右击：自动寻找栈桥边缘）
 再次右击可移除护栏。

使用钢栏杆右击可添加或移除护栏。
 无法颠倒放置，没有转角形态。
（和“普通”楼梯不同）
对齐方块顶面的栈桥，下方可以连接到钢杆。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_dou: 钢制双 T 型支架
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_flo:
装饰用钢制地板盖。
 顶端对齐。掉落物会穿过。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_fra:
钢框三层玻璃窗。绝缘良好。
 不像玻璃板一样连接到相邻方块。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_mes:
工业风格的栅栏。
 不与普通栅栏连接。

工业风格的栅栏门，可以与钢丝栅栏完美搭配。
 放置时可以设置为单叶门或者双叶门。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.steel_rai:
用于装饰的护栏。
 手持右击可以添加或移除特定面的栏杆。
 也可以放在钢栈桥上。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.straight_:
一段直输液管。
 单向传递流体。
 侧面不会与管道连接。
 会减少流速。潜行能反方向放置。

一段直输液管。
 单向传递流体。
 侧面不会与管道连接。
 会减少流速。潜行能反方向放置。没有红石信号时断流。

一段直输液管。
 单向传递流体。
 侧面不会与管道连接。
 会减少流速。
 潜行能反方向放置。
 没有红石信号时断流，流速与红石信号强度从 1 到 14 线性增长，15 时流速上限达到最大。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.thick_ste: 一段直空心杆（6x6x16），适用于结构支撑。
钢制部件，适合作为粗钢杆（6x6x16）的头或尾。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.thin_stee: 一段直空心杆（4x4x16），适用于结构支撑。
钢制部件，适合作为细钢杆（4x4x16）的头或尾。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.treated_w: 装饰性地板砖，有可变的贴图。

直杆的一段，有着继电器的直径。
 在需要特殊长度电线杆的时候很有用，也可以作为结构的柱子。
木制部件，适合作为直杆的头或尾。
重型木制支撑部件，适合作为直杆的头或尾。

坚固的木凳。
 适用于室内和室外使用。
rsgauges.config.title: 红石测量与开关 设置
block.engineers_decor_reforged.arrow_tar:
A target that emits a redstone
 pulse to the block it is attached
 to when it is hit with an arrow
 or activated by hand.
 Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.door_sens: §6一个挂在门上方墙上的玩家感应器。§r
block.engineers_decor_reforged.elevator_: 双稳态红石开关（电梯按钮）

Points up, down, or in both directions
depending on where you click the wall
when placing.
A switch that outputs a redstone
 signal for a short time, like a
 button.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_but: 脉冲红石开关 (星形玻璃按钮)

A switch that outputs a redstone
 signal for a short time, like a
 button.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Activate while already active to
 extend the pulse time.
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set a fixed pulse time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
Left-click with any dye to color
 tint the switch.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_con:
A glass floor plate that changes
 color and emits a redstone signal
 when exposed to mechanical
 pressure on the top (e.g. someone
 standing on it), and a short time
 after the pressure was released.
 Outputs are to the front and
 bottom. Does not emit any sounds.
 Sensors are high sensitive.
 Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
Left-click with any dye to color
 tint the switch.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_day: 自动红石开关 (玻璃日间计时器)

A small glass device that emits a
 redstone signal from a configured
 start (day) time to a configured
 end time. The time span is set
 with buttons on the device front
 face (24 hour format, where 06:00
 is sunrise). These buttons also set
 output power and a
 randomizing value. The latter setting
 delays switching on or off for
 a random time span, where higher
 values cause longer delays. Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on. Does not emit switching
 sounds.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_doo: 接触红石开关 (触摸屏可配置玻璃板)

A glass floor plate that changes
 color and emits a redstone signal
 when exposed to mechanical
 pressure on the top (e.g. someone
 standing on it), and a short time
 after the pressure was released.
 Outputs are to the front and
 bottom. Does not emit any sounds.
 Click on the touch config up/down
 buttons to set output power,
 entity filter, entity count,
 and sensitivity.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
Left-click with any dye to color
 tint the switch.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_ent: 自动红石开关 (玻璃红外运动探测器)

A small glass device that
 observes a defined volume and
 emits a redstone signal if it
 sees an entity. The volume is two
 blocks above and below, and 'range'
 in front, left and right (covers
 180 degrees). The range can be
 configured with small buttons on
 the front face, together with the
 output strength, the number of
 entities seen, and the entity type
 seen (mobs, players, animals, etc).
 Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on. Does not
 emit switching sounds.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_int: 自动红石开关 (玻璃间隔信号计时器)

Emits a signal with a defined on-
 and off-time. Configured using
 buttons on the front:
 - §1Blue: On-time§r
- §6Yellow: Off-time§r
- §2Green: Signal ramp up/down§r
- §4Red: Output power§r
 The timer is placed in standby
 mode for setup. Click on the front
 face to set it into run mode. Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
 As Switch Link target the timer
 toggles between run and standby
 mode.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_lin: 自动红石开关 (玻璃线性激光探测器)

A small glass device that observes
 in one direction and emits a
 redstone signal if it senses an
 entity. The observed volume is
 'range' blocks in front, and half
 a block to the sides. The range
 can be configured with small
 buttons on the front face, together
 with the output strength, the
 number of entities seen, and the
 entity type seen (mobs, players,
 animals, etc). Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on. Does not emit switching
 sounds. Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_rot: 双稳态红石开关 (星型玻璃开关)

A switch that is manually flipped
 on or off like a lever.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with any dye to color
 tint the switch.

A switch that outputs a redstone

Left-click with any dye to color
 tint the switch.

block.engineers_decor_reforged.glass_ver:
A display device that can be
 attached to a solid block to
 visualize the redstone power of
 that block. If the block can
 provide power itself, the gauge
 uses the output of it, otherwise
 the gauge will indirectly measure
 the power that the block receives
 from adjacent blocks. Strong and
 weak power is supported. Indirect
 weak measurements may have a
 short latency.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.industria: 红石指示器 (红色警示灯)
§6一个红石小灯泡，检测到所连接方块被充能后 会闪烁。§r激活时发光。
红石声音指示器 (警报器)
§6一个警报器，所连接方块被充能后会频繁 发出警报声。
红石测量仪 (大型模拟电压表)

§6一个显示设备，能显示所接 触的固体方块的红石充能等级。§r
如果该方块是红石电源，测量器 会显示其输出，否则会间接测量 该方块从邻接方块收到的信号。 能显示信号的强弱。间接测量可 能会有延迟。
红石测量仪 (小型模拟电压表)

A display device that can be
 attached to a solid block to
 visualize the redstone power of
 that block. If the block can
 provide power itself, the gauge
 uses the output of it, otherwise
 the gauge will indirectly measure
 the power that the block receives
 from adjacent blocks. Strong and
 weak power is supported. Indirect
 weak measurements may have a
 short latency.
方块检测开关 (工业系列)

Emits a redstone signal if one or
 more blocks in front of it match a
 configured category. Configure
 with the buttons at the back side:
 - §1Range§r (observing how far)
 - §6Threshold§r (how many matches)
 - §3Debouncing§r (anti-jitter delay)
 §4- Output power§r
 - §2Filter§r (solid, fluid, wood log)
 Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
脉冲红石开关 (方形机械按钮)

A switch that outputs a redstone
 signal for a short time, like a
 button.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Activate while already active to
 extend the pulse time.
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set a fixed pulse time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
Can be activated with projectiles.
自动红石开关（工业比较器开关）

A compact sensor switch that
 checks the block it is mounted on.
 If the attached block has
 comparator output, inventory
 contents, or redstone power, the
 switch turns on and emits
 full-strength redstone.
 Mount it on storage, tanks, or
 redstone hardware to convert the
 attached signal into a simple
 on/off control line.
接触红石开关 (灵敏方形接触垫)

An industrial floor contact mat
 that emits a redstone signal when
 exposed to mechanical pressure
 on the top side (e.g. someone
 standing on it), and a short time
 after the pressure was released.
 Outputs are to the front and bottom.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
自动红石开关 (日间计时器)

A small device that emits a
 redstone signal from a configured
 start (day) time to a configured
 end time. The time span is set
 with buttons on the device front
 face (24 hour format, where 06:00
 is sunrise). These buttons also set
 output power and a
 randomizing value. The latter setting
 delays switching on or off for
 a random time span, where higher
 values cause longer delays. Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
可调开关 (工业系列)

An industrial manual redstone
 power dimmer. Allows to manually
 set an output signal between 0
 and 15 at the back side of the
 device. The vertical click position
 defines the signal strength.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
接触红石开关 (门接触垫)

An industrial floor contact mat
 that emits a redstone signal when
 exposed to mechanical pressure on
 the top (e.g. someone standing on
 it), and a short time after the
 pressure was released. Outputs
 are to the front and bottom.
Click on the touch config up/down
 buttons to set output power,
 entity filter, entity count,
 and sensitivity.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).

A small device that measures the
 local light level at its location
 and emits a redstone signal
 based on configured on/off
 thresholds set with small
 buttons on the front face.§r These buttons also set
 output power and debouncing. Debouncing
 delays switching off or on until
 the light level is stable, higher
 values mean better noise
 filtering, but also more switching
 delay. If on and off settings are
 identical, then the measured
 light level must exactly match
 the set value. Output is sent to the block
 the sensor is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
自动红石开关 (雷电预测开关)

 emits a redstone signal when it

 in the air, i.e. in thunder
 storms.§r The buttons on the front

 the sensor is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).

 extend the pulse time.
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set a fixed pulse time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
Can be activated with projectiles.
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_co: 接触红石开关 (乡村式压力板)

A metal plate that emits a redstone
 signal when exposed to mechanical
 pressure from above (e.g. someone
 standing on it), and a short time
 after the pressure was released.
 Outputs are to the front and
 bottom.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_do: 接触红石开关 (乡村式门底板)

A metal plate that emits a
 redstone signal when exposed to
 mechanical pressure from above
 (e.g. someone standing on it),
 and a short time after the pressure
 was released. Outputs are to the
 front and bottom.
Click on the touch config up/down
 buttons to set output power,
 entity filter, entity count,
 and sensitivity.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_fa: 活板门开关 (乡村式物品活板门)

A metal trap door that swings
 open emits a redstone signal when
 something touches it. Output is
 to the block it is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_hi: 活板门开关 (乡村式冲击激活灵敏活板门)

Metal floor trap door that swings
 open and emits a redstone signal
 when someone or something falls
 on it, or when someone walks on
 it without sneaking. Output is to
 the block it is mounted on.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).

A switch that is manually flipped
 on or off like a lever.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this

A switch that outputs a redstone

Click with a Redstone Torch to

 through the options that this

Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set a fixed pulse time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
双稳态红石开关 (乡村式钉子)

A switch that is manually flipped
 on or off like a lever.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this

block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_se: 红石指示器 (小型乡村式旗语)

§6一个小金属盒，里面的信号旗会在所连接 方块被充能时举起。§r
如果该方块是红石电源，则显示其输出。 否则会显示该方块从邻接方块收到的 信号。
用染料左键能给旗子染色。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.rustic_sh: 接触红石开关 (乡村式冲击感应接触垫)

A metal plate emitting a redstone
 pulse when exposed to mechanical
 shock from above (e.g. something
 falls on it). Outputs are to the
 front and bottom. Power is always 15.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of
 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
活板门开关 (乡村式冲击激活活板门)

 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this

 redstone to set the hold-time
 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).

block.engineers_decor_reforged.sensitive: §6一个被红石信号充能时会像红石灯一样发光的玻璃方块。§r
block.engineers_decor_reforged.stained_s: §6一个玻璃方块，被红石信号充能时会从透明变为不透明。 §r虚线边框显示了未充能状态下的颜色。
block.engineers_decor_reforged.valve_whe: 双稳态红石开关（阀门开关）

A switch that is manually flipped
 on or off like a lever.
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
block.engineers_decor_reforged.yellow_po:
Artificial yellow flower that
 looks very similar to a dandelion,
 emitting a redstone signal to the
 front and bottom when something
 touches it (like a contact plate).
Click with a Redstone Torch to
 configure the output (cycles
 through the options that this
 switch supports).
Left-click with a stack of

 between 0.1s (1) and 6.4s (64).
item.engineers_decor_reforged.switchlink:
§6可用末影珍珠左键一个开关来创建开关连接珍珠。该开关会作为连接的目标， 会在连接珍珠被使用或连接珍珠被插入的连接起始开关激活时激活。§r
手持连接珍珠左键目标开关会循环切换连接选项。 可以在一个开关中插入多个连接珍珠。 连接珍珠会在过度紧张或找不到目标时抱怨，你可以听到这声音。 如果开关不适于作为起始或目标，珍珠也会抱怨。 不同种类的开关对于被连接触发时的反应也不同。
rsgauges.switch.feature.colortinting.hel: 可用任意染料左键来使开关染色。
rsgauges.switch.feature.contactmat.offde: 手持一组红石左键来将信号维持时间固定在0.1秒(1)到6.4秒(64)之间。
rsgauges.switch.feature.contactmat.touch: 右击上下箭头按钮配置输出信号强度、实体过滤、实体计数和灵敏度。
rsgauges.switch.feature.linksource.help: 用连接末影珍珠左键此开关来使其成为连接源。
rsgauges.switch.feature.linktarget.help: 用末影珍珠左键此开关来得到与其连接的连接末影珍珠。
rsgauges.switch.feature.outputconfig.hel: 空手左键可配置输出(在支持的不同输出模式间循环)。
rsgauges.switch.feature.pulseextend.help: 能在已激活时再激活一次来延长激活时间。
rsgauges.switch.feature.pulsetime.help: 手持一组红石左键可将脉冲间隔固定在0.1秒(1)到6.4秒(64)之间。
rsgauges.switch.feature.typebistable.hel: §6一种像扳手一样手动调节状态的开关。
rsgauges.switch.feature.typepulse.help: §6一个像按钮一样发出短时红石信号的开关。
rsgauges.switchlinking.relayconfig.confv: 激活状态与起始开关同步。
在起始开关打开时触发。
在起始开关关闭时触发。
在起始开关状态改变时触发。
激活状态与起始开关的反相同步。
rsgauges.switchlinking.source_assign.err: 已经连接到该珍珠的目标
连接珍珠不喜欢这个开关
这个开关不能连接至目标开关
目标对于这个开关来说过于遥远
目标开关已被破环或变更位置
rsgauges.switchlinking.target_assign.err: 这个开关不能作为连接目标
